message:
fix(integrity): include metadata and proof bundles in artifact hash computations

Close tamper-evidence gaps in three modules:

- evidence_emission: verify_artifact_integrity() now hashes metadata
  alongside ledger_entry so metadata mutations are tamper-detected.
  Widen compute_chain_hash from fn to pub(crate) fn for cross-module
  chain recomputation.
- recovery_artifact: verify_artifact() includes proof_bundle entries
  and operator_actions fields (operator, action, authorization_hash,
  timestamp_ticks) in artifact_id computation to match build(), closing
  a gap where proof bundles or operator actions could be modified
  post-creation without invalidating the artifact ID.
- migration_compatibility: recompute chain hashes after migration since
  artifact hashes now change when metadata is included. Test helper
  updated to recompute artifact_hash after modifying metadata.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
